title: Trust Configuration
description: Defines trusted signers, artifact groups, and trust mappings for Maven dependency signature verification.

keyservers.description: Keyserver URLs for fetching public keys.

on-untrusted.description: Policy when an artifact is signed by an untrusted signer.

verify-all-signatures.description: When true, all present signatures must verify. When false, one trusted signature is sufficient.

fetch-signer-info.description: Whether to fetch signer information from keyservers when not locally available.

signers.description: Named signer definitions. Each signer can be defined in minimal, short, or full form.

signer.description: A signer definition in one of three forms: minimal (email string), short (single-key object), or full (object with members array).

signerShort.description: Short form: a single-key signer with pgp4/pgp6 fingerprint and/or email directly on the object.

signerFull.description: Full form: a signer group with an optional display name and a list of members.

name.description: Display name for the signer group (e.g. "Apache Software Foundation").

members.description: List of individual signer credentials belonging to this group.

memberEntry.description: A single signer credential within a signer group.

artifacts.description: Named artifact groups. Each group maps a logical name to a list of Maven coordinate patterns.

trust.description: Maps artifact patterns or artifact group names to trusted signer references. If a key matches a name defined in 'artifacts', it is resolved as a group reference; otherwise it is treated as a Maven coordinate pattern.

signerRef.description: One or more references to signers defined in the 'signers' section.

oneOf.description: Multiple signer references (any of them is trusted).

unsigned.description: Artifact patterns or artifact group names for which no signature is expected. These artifacts are skipped during verification.

items.description: Maven coordinate pattern or artifact group name.
